subject: Fw: fyi
body:
I've asked him to forward pics of the furniture he proposing to be sure and not waste time bringing stuff up you would not like




Thx

G

----- Original Message -----
From: Jeffrey Gilman <jgilman@artefactousa.com>
To: 'Jennifer Turner' <jenniferturner@mindspring.com>
Sent: Mon Jan 07 18:09:49 2008
Subject: 

Hi Jennifer,

 

I wanted to let you know that Rachel and I have selected some pieces to switch out for the dark furniture you do not like. I have them on hold for you. They are coming in this week so I would like to bring them up and make the changes on site next week. I will be switching out two headboards, side tables and add some items for your televisions.

Please let me know if this is ok with you. 

 

Jeffrey
